# Irtiqa Marketing — Creative Marketing Agency

> Irtiqa Marketing is a full-service creative marketing agency helping startups, businesses, and enterprises grow through branding, digital marketing, AI solutions, websites, photography, videography, and performance-driven campaigns.

## About
Irtiqa Marketing is a premium, modern creative marketing agency combining design elegance, business analytics, and modern AI pipelines to scale brands. 
Led by Founder & Creative Director Faqeha Fatima, the agency builds authoritative brand structures and designs targeted growth campaigns.

## Services
- Branding (Logo Design, Brand Identity, Packaging, Brand Guidelines, Corporate Identity)
- Graphic Design (Social Media Creatives, Brochures, Catalogues, Flyers, Business Profiles, Print Design)
- Social Media Marketing (Instagram Management, Facebook Marketing, LinkedIn Marketing, Content Planning, Strategy, Growth)
- Video Production (Reels, Commercial Ads, Corporate Films, Motion Graphics, Video Editing)
- Photography (Product, Fashion, Corporate, Food, Lifestyle, Events)
- Website Development (Business Websites, Landing Pages, E-commerce, Portfolio Websites, Custom Development)
- SEO (On-Page SEO, Technical SEO, Local SEO, Content Optimization)
- Performance Marketing (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Lead Generation, Remarketing)
- AI Solutions (AI Automation, AI Content Creation, AI Chatbots, AI Marketing Workflow)
